name: ghost-layer-mcp
display_name: Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Bridge + Execution Matrix MCP
description: MCP server for Ghost Layer cross-chain bridge and on-chain Execution Matrix. Settle RLUSD (XRPL), XAH (Xahau), and USDC (Base/EVM) micropayments synchronously with full compliance receipts. Mint 54-block programmable routing state.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Execute a cross-chain bridge transaction synchronously. For XRPL, provide signer/signature. For Base, provide the nested eip3009 authorization object. Deducts a toll fee.

gross_amount.description: Amount to bridge as decimal string

tools.name: ghost_agent_loyalty
tools.description: Check the settlement loyalty tier and effective fee discount for an agent wallet.

tools.name: ghost_x402_dispense
tools.description: Fetch a premium product from the Ghost Layer X402 vending machine (e.g., routing.telemetry). The MCP client will automatically intercept the HTTP 402 Payment Required challenge, pay it, and retry.

tools.name: decision_notarize
tools.description: Mint any AI decision as an immutable URIToken on Xahau. Pay via X402 using product_id 'decision.notarize' (0.001 RLUSD, STANDARD), 'decision.notarize.certified' (0.01 RLUSD, adds Ed25519 certificate), or 'decision.notarize.sovereign' (0.05 RLUSD, SOVEREIGN grade). Loyalty discounts applied automatically. Returns decision_hash, xahau_tx, verify_url, and (for CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN) a signed certificate.

payload.description: The AI decision object to notarize

agent_wallet.description: Your XRPL wallet address (for loyalty tier)

endpoint.description: API endpoint that produced this decision

tools.name: x402_attestation_pubkey
tools.description: Retrieve Ghost Layer's Ed25519 public key to independently verify CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN decision certificates.

tools.name: cube_state_mint
tools.description: Mint the Ghost Layer Execution Matrix state as a URIToken on Xahau. Submit the full 54-block payload. Server validates all face centers via the equation center=clamp(weighted_sum(edges)×coefficient(corners), min, max), verifies the CUBE-XXXXXXXX hash.

cube_hash.description: CUBE-XXXXXXXX deterministic djb2 hash of the 54-block state
